entry.title: Printing Multiple Invoices per Page in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
I need to print four invoices side by side on a single A4 page using Crystal Reports. To achieve this, I'll divide the A4 page into four equal sections. Each section will contain a unique invoice, ensuring no duplication or repetition of invoices. This layout will allow me to display four invoices efficiently on every A4 page.

I attempted to design invoices side by side on a single A4 page, but the printing process is producing duplicate invoices and failing to print subsequent invoice records.

entry.title: Re: Fiori launchpad content manager vs Launchpad designer
entry.content: Hello Sankar, As this post is from 2020, can you please confirm if there is a change in Best Prachtices for managing custom technical catalogs? I have read that Launchpad designer and Group concept is deprecated. We are using UI5 Apps and are presently using Launchpad designer for maintaing custom technical catalogs and custom business catalogs. Can the technical catalogs be confiured using /UI2/FLPAM for SAP UI5 Apps

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Extensibility – Simplified Guide for Beginners
entry.content: Great work in explaining the concept in one blog. Thanks a bunch @Raja_Gupta

entry.title: How to export data from SAC Planning ODE Story into Google Sheets
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to export the data from SAC ODE story on a click of a button & import it to Google Sheets. I know which the recent release we have a option to export data to Google slides but I'm looking for Google sheets. Has any one come across such a requirement & what is the custom solution for the same. Thanks.

 

 

Regards

Murali.M

entry.title: Re: Missing items during addition of ADT plugin to Eclipse
entry.content:
These are additional Eclipse dependencies needed by ADT, which need to be fetched from the Eclipse update site.

Do you have [x] Contact all update sites during install to find requried software enabled on the first page of the "Help ->Install new software" wizard?

entry.title: Re: How to integrate SAP Datasphere Consumption API in SA...
entry.content:
The Check Connection only checks whether it can reach the destination, and since you got a 401 it was able to reach it, though could not authenticate you. You can actually see by the icon that the check connection feature considers this a success.

I would try the destination from the app and see if it works.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2024
entry.content:
Hi Arunkumar AS,

what kind of information do you mean? Can you please provide us more details regarding the issue you mentioned. Do you have created a ticket for your issue?

Regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: Data append from one database to another
entry.content: Our requirement is not table structure change. It is to add data from source database to target database, without removing any data in the target.

entry.title: Enjoying TechEd virtual while developing CAP solutions
Re: How to show/ hide Indicator charts in SAC dashboard b...
entry.content:
Hi,

Good day!!

[Edited] Just now thought of the workaround script . Please check if the below code helps 🙂

1. Check the current user Role

2. If the required role present hide or show the widgets

 

//Write the code OnInitialization of the page
//Get the Current User Role
var CurrentUserRoles = Application.getRolesInfo();
console.log(CurrentUserRoles);

//For RequiredRole1 display the table
if(CurrentUserRoles.includes("RequiredRole1") === true)
{
	Table_1.setVisible(true);
	Chart_1.setVisible(false);
}
//For RequiredRole2 display the chart
if(CurrentUserRoles.includes("RequiredRole2")===true)
{
	Table_1.setVisible(false);
	Chart_1.setVisible(true);

}

 

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

What do you want to achieve?

Regards

 Norman

entry.title: To set the Ranges for expats as "0" or NA
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We have used standard field from EC to display in the worksheet for Ranges (Min, Mid and Max). we want to set the ranges to NA or 0 in worksheet  or EC for expats, to identify expats we have created a column called as "Is Expat" & written business rule to consider only the host assignment, if the value of 'Is Expat' is yes then they are expats.

Request to please suggest a solution on how to make them as NA or 0 either in EC or worksheet. 

Regards,

Shaheen

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud and On-Premise SAP HANA SSO Setup With External Identity Provider
entry.content: Hi @ankitarora_04 , I currently using SSO Authentication for my Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA. Everything work perfectly except the one thing: The SAP HANA XS auto log off after I restart my computer or after a day, and I need to log in again( image below). How can I config HANA XS never log out (session time out = never) ? Because I share the report for other 50 people in my company, and each people has his/her own SAC account corresponding to a HANA account (because I use a Live Connection so the only way to data authentication is in HANA instead of in SAC). And I don't want to provide password of HANA to user because of sensitive so I want to setup the logon HANA XS once for each user, so that every time they view the report, the logon session still there.

entry.title: Re: What's Export Import Sighting Record in S4 Hana

Thanks for your response. I found out later, it's NOT a standard Fiori APP, but apparently my customer has developed a custom one, where we were looking for 'how it works'..........I am yet to align with my technical team who helped develop those APPs. 

For now, kindly consider my query as 'closed'. 

Cheers, Siva

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Technical Catalog Migration – How the migration process works
entry.content:
Hello @Jocelyn_Dart ,

Thanks for the much-needed blog. We are currently using launchpad designer. We have custom Ui5 apps and the original target mappings for these apps are placed within catalogs  which we refer to as our custom technical catalog. We have also created business catalogs where the apps are included as references from the custom technical catalogs

As part of our uprade to S/4HANA, we are considering transitionin to using the Content Manager and Application Manager. However I couldn't locate the tansaction /UI2/MGR_TC in the upgraded system. Could this be due to our version? If so, should we manually confugure catalogs and SAP UI5 Apps using /UI2/FLPAM or is the  Launchpad designer still required?

Additionally, in the  /UI2/FLPAM transaction, the app type SAPUI5  Fiori App doesn't seem to be available.

Can you please share the latest documention or guidance for handling this scenario

Thank you in advance for your support,

Smriti Gupa

entry.title: Re: Business Catalog missing in App "Manage Launchpad Pages"
entry.content:
Hi Kai! 

adding the Launchpad App Descr Item ID to the IAM App solved the issue!

entry.title: Re: SAP ISU - Meter to Cash

entry.title: Change document not showing latest CR for business partner in 'Display change document' in SAP MDG.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

User has created one CR which is final check approved with some changes in business partner. But it's not showing under 'Display change document' on NWBC for that business partner. If we open the change request and then go to the change document, we are able to see the change log. What could be the reason behind this?

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) Forecasting Algorithms

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.
May I kindly suggest you to read again my first posting? It contains everything you need to know about my work.
There is nothing to be filled for the mandatory condition, I explained in my first posting that its requirement is not met for it and that is the reason that particular pricing condition is not active in any of the 3 documents mentioned: sales order, first invoice and cancellation invoice. Since the pricing problem is only active in the cancellation invoice I'm confident to believe that's not the cause of my problem.

What else can you suggest for me?

Thank you.

entry.title: Quantum Computing: The Next Big Leap in Tech (And Why You Should Care)
entry.content:
This tech innovation is rapidly shaping up to be a game-changer—and it’s not just for scientists or tech geeks. It’s something that could touch every aspect of our lives, whether we realize it or not.

So, what is quantum computing? To keep it simple, it’s a new type of computer that doesn’t just think in binary (0s and 1s) like our current computers. Instead, quantum computers use qubits, which can exist in multiple states at once. This gives them the ability to process massive amounts of data far faster than any supercomputer today.

Why should this matter to you? Well, imagine a world where we can solve complex problems in seconds that would take traditional computers years to crack. Think about breakthroughs in drug discovery, climate change solutions, or unbreakable encryption to protect your data. Quantum computing could make these “what ifs” a reality sooner than we think.

It’s not just a far-off dream either. Companies are already investing heavily in making quantum computing a practical reality. And who knows—maybe in the next decade, quantum-powered smartphones could be in our pockets!

Curious to learn more? Exploring Quantum Computing by Nature

Quantum computing isn’t just the future—it’s coming faster than we think. Are you ready to be part of the next big leap?

entry.title: Re: Pre-delivered PCC validations.
entry.content: you can see the SAP Note 3143779 - SAP Best Practices for Payroll Control Center - Based on "Manage Configuration Application"

entry.title: Re: Api to change measure in dynamic reference line
entry.content:
// Assuming you have a reference to your visualization
const viz = /* your visualization reference */;
const newMeasure = 'SUM(Sales)'; // Example of the new measure

// Update the reference line
viz.setReferenceLine({
measure: newMeasure,
label: 'Updated Sales Reference',
lineType: 'dashed',
color: '#FF5733',
});

// Refresh the visualization to apply changes
viz.refresh();

 

Note: The newMeasure and other parameters according to your needs

entry.title: Re: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content: Dear bg, actually, there is an intranet application for personnel to apply for their annual leave and a workflow logic to route the request to his supervisor. His supervisor then check a for approval. The data then became part of an interface records to upload to SAP for generating the IT2001 record. Hence his supervisor is responsible to validate the accuracy rather than SAP does the validation.

entry.title: Re: Accessing PCC Processes Issue
entry.content: what's the details Odata error you got ? Could be an authorization issue

entry.title: Re: Integrate Sharepoint online with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

To be honest I am not sure anymore. The thing is we have changed our approach. Somehow for SAC > SharePoint integration there is a separate tutorial / SAP note, which works a bit differently:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3446524/E

We found out that if we create a SAC > SharePoint connection using this SAP note we can reuse the Open Connector instance for Datasphere > SharePoint. So this is what we do now. I don't follow the description from above anymore.

In this SAP note it is explained which redirect URI you should use. I assume that for the steps that I have described above same redirect URI should be fine.

Best,

Koray

entry.title: Error shows that Labor resource not available for service
entry.content:
The user is not able to release a sales order, due to the error saying that Labor Resource not available for service item.

Error: Item **: Labor resource not available for service performer ABC. (ABC represents the service performer ID)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error shows that Labor resource not available for ser...
entry.content:
The reason for this error is due to the fact that there is no active Labor Resource matches the service performer (cost center, job), so it is not able to fill the labor resource in the order.

You will need to maintain the valid Labor Resource match the service performer.

KBA 1692907 explains the same.

1692907 - In Your Sales Orders the Error Message : "Labor resource not available for service performer" is Triggered

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/1692907

entry.title: Re: How can we add entry in TKEVG table ?

And I want to modify the entry to add a ‘PA Transfer Structure’. How can I change the PA Transfer Structure for the KOAE Business Transaction ?

Thank you,

Regards,

Maxime

entry.title: Hierarchy not brought in via Cloud data integration connection in Datasphere
entry.content: When I tried to bring in the Master Data (from the Dimension Table) via the SAC Connection created in Datasphere using the Cloud Data Integration connection in Datasphere, the Hierarchy is not brought into Datasphere from the Dimension table in SAC Model. Other columns like Member ID and Description are brought in except the Hierarchy column. I tried via both the Remote Tables and Data Flow; the Hierarchy is not brought in from SAC to Datasphere using the Cloud Data Integration (CDI) connection. Can you support on how to bring the Hierarchy using the CDI connection.

entry.title: Re: How can I change my username?
entry.content: Update 2024: The user name (display name) can now be changed at https://community.sap.com/t5/user/myprofilepage/tab/personal-profile.

entry.title: 🔵 Harness Generative AI Integration using SAP Cloud SDK for AI
entry.content:
In this session, we'll explore how to integrate Generative AI capabilities into your projects using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI, leveraging the SAP AI Core infrastructure. We'll cover key orchestration features like templating, content filtering and simplified LLM access, and as well as LLM access using the industry-standard framework LangChain.

Speaker: Deeksha Sinha, SAP

entry.title: Re: How can I change my username?
entry.content: Update 2024: The user name (display name) can now be changed at https://community.sap.com/t5/user/myprofilepage/tab/personal-profile.

entry.title: Specific Identification of Costs in S4H Public Cloud for Serial/Batch-Managed Items
entry.content: Is there no specific identification of costs S4 HANA Public Cloud?  Our clients (mostly from SAP Business One) who are transitioning to S4 have their costs managed through Serial and Batch which is a basic configuration in Business One.  Now, they want to have this same requirement in S4 since their items are not interchangeable and managed by serial numbers (chassis/engine).  Since the items are not interchangeable though they have the same item codes, they want the costs specifically identified also to the serial number.

entry.title: Credit Check Rule
entry.content:
Dear experts,

May I know what is the function of these Credit Check Rules in Manage Credit Account - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?
1. 01 (Default - All Checks Active (Stat. Credit Limit))
2. 02 (Credit Limit Check Only (Statistical))
3. 03 (Credit Limit Check Only (Dynamic))

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Using the new selective deletion functionality in SAP DSP to track record deletion in the source
entry.content:
Hi,

I also noticed when filtering on Date fields that this is only possible to delete records with the date before X days. Where you can select X. Rather than selecting a range: from date 1 to date 2, which would make more sense to be able to do.

 

I guess you can always change the format of the field to a String and the use the between operator. Hope they see this as a missing feature?

Thibault

entry.title: Supplier Return Process - Do not want the returned product back.
entry.content:
Hi sap,
I need instruction with return to supplier process
in this case :
I received a product and I haven't issued an invoice for it yet, I want to return it to the supplier but without a replacement,
What should I do? In the follow up decision do I fill a credit memo? Then make an outbound delivery to the supplier?
And then what? I don't want to receive again, on the other hand, the order is in the status waiting for reception.
What should I do next to complete this order correctly?

thank you




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier Return Process - Do not want the returned pr...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To return the item you have received from a supplier, you can create a supplier return notification and then process the delivery proposal created against it. How the system processes the return depends on the follow up decisions you select while creating the supplier return notification document. Since you do not want to have the item repaired and returned by your supplier you can choose the option "Credit Memo" in the Follow-Up Decision field while creating the return notification. 

Specific to the case where you do not expect the item to be return from your supplier, and the invoice is not created follow the below sequence. 

  1. Create the Supplier Return Notification with Follow-up Decision value as "Credit Memo". 
  2. Process the Supplier Return created in the Purchase Orders and Requests work center and release it. 
  3. Once the Supplier Return document is released the system will create a delivery proposal of the type Return to Supplier that is displayed in the Delivery Proposals sub-view of the Outbound Logistics work center.
  4. You can create an outbound delivery document and release this delivery note to send the product back to your supplier. 

The complete process of how to create supplier returns in ByDesign is available in the help document titled "Return to Supplier Processing in Purchasing".

Regards, 
Anand
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: ALV Report as Pivot Table Data
entry.content:
This is a sample sales report that offers solutions for various ALV reporting needs. Hope it helps.

  • Report code is completely portable. It does not require any structure, text or screen elements.
  • Using dynamic SQL strings, operations such as summing, averaging, calculating maximum or minimum values based on grouped fields can be performed, and the results are displayed in dynamically generated ALV columns.
  • Drill-down capable pivot tables can be created.
  • Grid, list, and tree views can be selected.
  • Filtered variant data can be exported to Excel.
  • Data can be divided into separate worksheets.
  • Variant descriptions formatted in HTML can be stored and added in the body of the sent email.

entry.title: IAS Integration on DEV instance SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hi, client has already set up IAS on their Test instance now they need to set it up on DEV (they will have same IAS which is used for Test). The integration with IAS now ensures that it is not possible to create two accounts with the same email in the instances. However, in the case of connecting both DEV and TEST, this would happen. You would have the same users in both environments. How to avoid this?

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS - CDS Watch does not display data
entry.content: yes I did. There is nothing extraordinary on the project. I performed npm install, and npm @ash_G/cds.

entry.title: Re: deletion of lock objects
entry.content: Thanks Ferry L. This was very helpful for me.

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content:
For Sybase ASE, solution here to unlock the user: How to unlock users using sql console on SAP Netwe... - SAP Community. In short:

1.

isql -USAPSR3 -X -SNPL

2.

1> update USR02 set UFLAG=0 where BNAME='SAP*' and MANDT='000'
2> GO
(1 row affected)

SAP* user in client 000 is now unlocked.

entry.title: Plant "phased" roll out of SAP S4/HANA for Product Compliance
entry.content:
Dear SAP S4/HANA for Product Compliance

My customer is a multi-company conglomerate and is now considering a "phased" roll out (and go live) of SAP S4/HANA for Product Compliance (PC and PMA) by plant: first "1100", then "1200" and so on. 

How can I make this work? Is it possible with SAP S4/HANA for Product Compliance?

It might be a silly doubt at this point, but humbly request your assitance.

Thank you

Paulo

entry.title: Tax type for supplier (bussines partner supplier view)
entry.content:
Hi all

I need the following key combination for tax condition records on PO.

1 ) Country of origin (OK already in place)

2 ) Country of destination (OK already in place)

3 ) Tax indicator for material (purchasing view, OK already in place)

4 ) Tax type for supplier (purchasing view of the bussiness partner) → MISSING

This is the supplier role of a customer where i can assign a tax type.

And i can see in the parameters list to create the key combination for PO the tax type is in here

Not sure why i am getting negatives to create this key combination from my current SAP consultors in the public cloud as i had this in prior SAP versions

May be i am missing something?

Many thanks

entry.title: HCM - Time Wage Type Generation
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Kindly suggest me on the below requirement.

Current system config:

We have 4 Attendances codes, as follows: 1019, 1020, 1021 & 1027. And following Wage Types gets generated and added to ZL table for each of the A/A codes respectively, WT2008, WT2009, WT2010, WT2011. Also, there's a condition that users are allowed to register hours on above A/A codes only once for every week.

For example: Person M recorded 1 hour using A/A 1019 on Monday, so he is no more allowed to register hours on the same A/A code or any other A/A codes until next Tuesday.

Kindly help me write a PCR on below requirement or provide any article relating to the same.

Condition: In any given month, the first 3 week's WT's should only gets generated.

For example: In October, the user registered hours for the first three weeks and WT got generated. However, even if the user registers hours in the fourth and fifth week, the WT should not get generated.

Kindly help on above.

Many thanks in advance.

Sai

entry.title: Count parameter in an Odata v4 service, using RAP, doesn't work
entry.content:
Dear experts and 

I've facing a strange error when testing the corresponding authorities-checks using DCL on a CDS view, and its corresponding oData service.

Giving a context, I've created a view root view, its projection view and access control. Then I've published its projection view in a service definition and service binding. In both objets, entity view and projection view, I've changed the @AccessControl.authorizationCheck to #CHECK

When I filter the entity by a certain value, it doesn't return any value, as it's not included the user authority-check. So, it's right.

However, when I apply the parameter count to the same URL, it returns the value "2". I've already cleaned its cache in the tcode /IWFND/V4_ADMIN, but I still have the same issue. 

Please, I would appreciate if you could help me with this problem.

Best regards,

 

 

Rogerio

entry.title: Re: ALV Report as Pivot Table Data
entry.content: Complete source code :

entry.title: System is looking for the wrong PA Transfer Structure during production order settlement
entry.content:
Hello

I have created a production order and maintained the PA transfer structure "Z1" under "Settlement parameters". The PA Transfer structure is set by default according to the production order type.

But when I am executing the variance settlement (KO88/CO88), I am getting the following error message "Complete PA transfer structure FI"(KD514) even though I maintained the structure as "Z1".

I don't understand why the system is looking for "FI" instead of "Z1"

Can you please help me on this topic ?

Many thanks,

Regards,

Maxime

entry.title: Re: ALV Report as Pivot Table Data
entry.content: Complete source code : https://github.com/sozergul/SAP-ALV-Pivot

entry.title: Re: HCM - Time Wage Type Generation
entry.content:
Hi 

To implement your requirement using a Personnel Calculation Rule (PCR), you can follow these steps

Define the Week and Month Conditions: You need to determine the current week of the month and check if it's within the allowed range (first three weeks).
Check Attendance Code Registration: Ensure that hours for the specified attendance codes are registered only once per week.
Control Wage Type Generation: Based on the week and whether the attendance codes have been used, control the generation of the wage types.

Please try the below sample code

* Initialize variables
INCLUDE <SAP standard includes for date functions>

* Determine the current week and month
CURRENT_WEEK = GET_CURRENT_WEEK()
CURRENT_MONTH = GET_CURRENT_MONTH()

* Check if the week is within the allowed range
IF CURRENT_WEEK <= 3 THEN
* Check if any of the attendance codes have been used in this week
IF ATTENDANCE_CODE_USED(1019) OR ATTENDANCE_CODE_USED(1020) OR ATTENDANCE_CODE_USED(1021) OR ATTENDANCE_CODE_USED(1027) THEN
* Generate wage types if conditions are met
GENERATE_WAGE_TYPE(WT2008)
GENERATE_WAGE_TYPE(WT2009)
GENERATE_WAGE_TYPE(WT20010)
GENERATE_WAGE_TYPE(WT20011)
ENDIF
ENDIF

* Function to check if an attendance code has been used this week
FUNCTION ATTENDANCE_CODE_USED(ATT_CODE)
* Logic to check if the given attendance code was used in the current week
RETURN USED_FLAG
ENDFUNCTION

* Function to generate wage types
FUNCTION GENERATE_WAGE_TYPE(WAGE_TYPE)
* Logic to add the wage type to the ZL table
ENDFUNCTION

entry.title: Re: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hi @AdityaKapoor,

For changing the Heading, In SQVI, enter the query name and click change.
You will come to the Quick Viewer XXX list design page, Which shows the Data fields on the left and on the rights we can see all the columns which are shown in the output, just click on the required column heading and Change the name as required and Save it.

Hope this helps!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

best Regards Roland

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community

Hi David,

Thank you for this opportunity. I am Shivani and I am keen to explore and build a career in SAP.

entry.title: Re: Remote Monitoring of HANA Database from Solman
entry.content:
Got a question, for what reason is needed hdbuserstore Key <SID>SAPDBCTRL & <SID>SAPDBCRTL<TEN>

According to SAP Note 2023587 it needs completely other authorizations ... 
So which one is correct?

BR,
Lukas

entry.title: Re: We are looking for a Technology, Software, Gas, Oil,...
entry.content: okay thanks

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
Hello @AndreyF and @Dominik_Graus 

what ever the Discussion of NSE goes to, it is only an emergency pull.
the much stabler move is the DTO option as Dominik already mentioned, however NLS (nearlins storage) is the Mother of all the Solutions.

See the Blogs - SAP BW NLS Solution - Q – the easy Installer for SAP IQ - ng 2024

best regards Roland

entry.title: Cannot transfer Consensus Demand from IBP to ERP as PIR - No line written to staging table
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am struggling setting up the Release of Consensus Demand from IBP to ERP as Planned independent requirements. 
For integration I used the template IBP_to_ERP_PIR_via_RFC_2108 and did everything in the yellow stickers except the usage of MRP types. Validation returns no error, only one warning: The source node <GetRFCOutput.ET_MESSAGE> in the iteration rule for the target node <[CollectMessages]> is 0. This might cause and error on the dataflow execution. 

ET_Message of CallRFC returns "Inhalt von Paketnummer 1 wurde nicht in der Staging-Tabelle gesichert". Which means, that the content of package number 1 wasn't saved in staging table. Besides that, I don't get any other information. The trace in debug is also not say much more to me. SU53 did not provide any missing authorizations and /IBP/ETS_PIR_MON is empty. 

Does someone know the issue? What am I missing? 

 

Best regards and thanks in advance.

entry.title: 📢 Transition from TS410 to Cloud-Based IE2EE
entry.content:
SAP University Alliances member institutions have long offered SAP certification to highlight students' SAP expertise. The "Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA (TS410)" course will retire on June 30, 2025 and be replaced by "End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise (IE2EE)" with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, which is now available. SAP University Alliances will provide next steps for users of TS410. 

📢 For new certifications, start with the cloud-based course

entry.title: Re: SAP Single Sign-On: Authenticate with Kerberos/SPNEGO
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use the new solution SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI, which is the successor solution for our old on-premise SAP Single Sign-On 3.0 product.

With the SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI you can easily integrate with your existing corporate identity provider, such as Azure AD (Entra ID).

More information is available in SAP Community here:

https://community.sap.com/topics/single-sign-on

Best regards,

Martina

entry.title: SSAM MDK Xcode distribution to App Store Connect fails with Invalid executable (contains bitcode)
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to distribute my SSAM application to the App Store Connect using Xcode. I have done this successfully a few months ago, but now it stopped working and throws the following error:

 

"Invalid executable. The executable contains bitcode."

The app builds successfully with MDK 24.4.3

How could this be solved?

Thanks,

Zsolt

entry.title: Re: Change time for only one company code
entry.content: Hi I would like to Change the date in the company code to 10 2024 and i am not able to do so error is:-

entry.title: Re: Change time for only one company code
entry.content:
Hi, Need help please...  I would like to Change the date in the company code to 10 2024 and i not able to do so
error is :-

Incorrect period in control rec. of CoCd FMOT; no conversion
The current period (month/year) of the control record is102021

 

Period closing complete; log issued.

entry.title: Re: Long time to number Nota Fiscal (Brazilian Invoice)
entry.content:
The problem was in the "job" that submits the program J_BNFECALLRFC. There is only one job for all the Notas Fiscais, then when it is going to number a Nota with many items, it just goes to next one when the current is finished.

We removed this kind of document of the internal table and created other job to number this one in an enhancement.

entry.title: Re: SAP ILM with SAP IQ Database
entry.content:
Additional information to the Fiori Appy usage

Fiori Apps for Data Volume Management

entry.title: Re: Plant "phased" roll out of SAP S4/HANA for Product Co...
entry.content:
Dear @Paulo_Pinto ,

Do you want to run the new S/4HANA for Product Compliance solution or some classical solution like SAP Product and REACH Compliance or Product Safety under S/4HANA?

Assuming you want to run S/4HANA for Product Compliance (new): This can for sure work. But it depends a bit on our current SAP System Landscape:

If all plants are on the same S/4HANA systems, there is no issue.

If the plants are on different S/4HANA systems you would need to run S/4HANA for Product Compliance on these different systems. The reason is, that so far a 'distributed' scenario - meaning a central S/4HANA for Product Compliance system and multiple logistics system - is currently not supported. Support for this will come in 2025.

Hope that helps

Mark

entry.title: Re: Creating a SuccessFactors Learning Story Report: A Comprehensive Guide
Join Us at ASUG TechConnect 2024: Elevate Your SAP Journey with Exclusive Sessions
entry.content:
ASUG TechConnect 2024 is just around the corner, offering an exciting opportunity to explore the latest SAP innovations, connect with industry leaders, and dive deep into sessions that will empower your SAP transformation. With insightful presentations and expert-led discussions, you'll gain practical insights to drive success in your organization. 

We are thrilled to announce a series of must-attend sessions hosted by our top executives and experts. Whether you're focusing on AI, cloud strategies, or system operations, these sessions will provide the knowledge and tools you need to optimize your SAP experience. Plus, don't miss the chance to visit our booth within the SAP area, which will be dedicated to SAP CloudALM and Customer Support.

Let’s help you transform your business.

Here’s what you can expect:

November 12, 2024 at 10:15 AM

Crafting an AI Roadmap: Strategies for Measuring AI Benefits
Speakers: Stefan Steinle and Wieland Schreiner
Join Stefan and Wieland as they delve into the intricacies of creating a robust AI roadmap tailored to your organization's needs. This session will cover essential strategies for planning and implementing AI initiatives while ensuring measurable benefits. Learn how to assess the impact of AI on your operations, optimize your processes, and quantify the value added, enabling a clear path to AI-driven success.

November 12, 2024 at 10:15 AM

Choosing the Right Path to SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Speaker: Jörg Marenk
Discover the various options SAP offers for transitioning to the cloud, including SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Private Edition, and two-tier scenarios. Explore which is the best fit for your organization and gain insights into the latest version, SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.

November 12, 2024 at 11:15 AM

Support Expert Session: Harnessing AI and Automation for an Enhanced Support Experience
Speakers: Mohammed Ajouz, Oliver Huschke
Explore how to leverage AI and intelligent automation to maximize your support experience. In this session, discover how to use live support channels and preventative services to receive exceptional value and improve support outcomes. Learn about the latest AI enhancements, including Incident Solution Matching, automatic translation, and channel recommender available through SAP for Me and Built-in Support. Gain practical insights and tips from our experts to help you access the right support services more effectively. Leave with actionable strategies to make the most of your support interactions and achieve better results.

November 12, 2024 at 11:15 AM

Control SAP BTP Changes with SAP Cloud ALM: Best Practices and Observability
Speakers: Umesh Jagadesh, Evan Stoddard
Unlock the full potential of SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) with SAP Cloud ALM. Discover how to effectively manage and control changes in SAP BTP to drive efficiency and innovation. Learn best practices for SAP BTP operations, including the use of Terraform for automatic resource management, central monitoring with SAP Cloud ALM, and new administrative features for usage and cost monitoring. Explore how SAP Cloud ALM serves as the central observability platform for custom CAP applications, using OpenTelemetry for comprehensive monitoring across local and central tools.

November 12, 2024 at 2:25 PM

Transform Your SAP Experience: Unlocking the Power of Cloud and Support
Speakers: Geoff Scott, Stefan Steinle
Ready to revolutionize your SAP journey? Join Stefan and Geoff as they reveal how harmonizing cloud operations with customer support leads to seamless implementations. Discover the game-changing potential of Cloud ALM and RISE with SAP. Learn from real-world success stories and empower your organization to thrive in the cloud.

November 13, 2024 at 11:05 AM

Revolutionizing Operations: SAP Cloud ALM Best Practices for UiPath’s SAP S/4HANA Journey
Speakers: Sanjoy Rath, Jorge Ruiz
In the digital era, efficient process monitoring is crucial. UiPath excels by integrating with third-party products like Office365, MS Teams, Slack Channel, and other SaaS Products for real-time alerts and collaborative problem-solving.  Attend this session to hear how the integration of SAP Cloud ALM enhances UiPath's capabilities by providing comprehensive monitoring for RISE with SAP systems, including SAP S/4HANA, SAP BTP, and boundary systems.  

November 13, 2024 at 11:15 AM

How to Move from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM
Speakers: Evan Stoddard, Vijay Prakash
Transitioning from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM is crucial for enhancing implementations, operations, and service. This session will guide you through various adoption scenarios and provide actionable insights for planning and executing your transition. Learn about the tools and content available now, as well as what's on the product roadmap, to streamline your move to SAP Cloud ALM.

November 13, 2024 at 1:00 PM

SAP Runs SAP: Leading the AI Revolution in Customer Support
Speakers: Stefan Steinle, Jens Trotzky
Discover our AI-driven customer support model, where innovative strategies fuse AI with customer service to enhance efficiency and satisfaction. Explore our journey as we set new standards in AI-powered service excellence. Leverage this blueprint to seamlessly integrate AI into your organization and unlock success through the SAP for Me portal.

November 13, 2024 at 2:40 PM

Transform Your Business with an Integrated Transformation Toolchain
Speaker: Jörg Marenk
Discover how to navigate a clean core ERP transformation using an integrated business transformation toolchain with the RISE with SAP methodology. Learn how to effectively transform your business processes and application landscape while maintaining a lean environment. Explore how to utilize SAP LeanIX, SAP Cloud ALM, and SAP Signavio solutions to drive your strategy from planning to execution, ensuring a clean core and long-term sustainability.

November 14, 2024 at 12:45 PM

Adopt Clean Core During your Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Speakers: Wieland Schreiner, Jörg Marenk, Evan Stoddard
Discover how SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Readiness Check can enhance your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system conversion by offering robust planning, execution, and monitoring capabilities. Learn how to adopt a clean core ERP for a smooth transition.

November 14, 2024 at 4:15 PM

SAP for Me: Bundles Unleashed
Speakers: Anna Withum, Carsten Schwarz
The new "Bundles" feature empowers you to align your SAP systems seamlessly with your business processes. This innovative tool allows you to use your own terminology, ensuring you fully grasp the impact of any disruptions and clearly identify which processes are affected. Don't miss this opportunity to learn how "Bundles" can enhance your operational efficiency and provide you with greater clarity and control. Join us to explore this feature in depth and discover how it can benefit your organization.

These sessions are packed with actionable insights and hands-on strategies to help you maximize your SAP investment. Make sure to add these sessions to your personal agenda and visit us at our booth in the SAP area, where we’ll be showcasing SAP CloudALM and discussing how our customer support solutions can transform your SAP journey.

Register now and take the next step in optimizing your SAP operations at ASUG TechConnect 2024!

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: My Cat is my Gym trainer

entry.title: Signavio: How to add more roles to the Process Approval Workflow?
entry.content:
Hello,

I do have the scenario to have more than 5 different roles involved in the approval workflow.
How can I add more roles in Process Governance, which can be also linked to the Process Manager.

Thank you

entry.title: GRC 12.0 Integration with S4HANA RISE (Private Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Team

Can we connect GRC 12.0 with S4HANA RISE (Private Cloud or Public Cloud) without IAG or IAG Bridge.

Also, please advise if there exist a blog or Snote that describes. 

Regards

NG

entry.title: Re: Guide to use HANA NSE in the BW/4HANA system
entry.content:
Hi @RolandKramer 

Your points are right, 

the only addition here is about our case, the most benefit we get is putting the indexes of the ADSO's into the NSE, (maybe 80% of the size) like NSE advisor suggested (the suggestion was to put only the index), and the tables themselves kept in the memory.

I tried DTO, but it did not work out in our scenario, due to lack of clarity and some issues regarding the setup, which I addressed to Dominik already.

So I agree, it would be nice to have an "out of the box" working solution, but unfortunately standard is not flexible enough for us.

kind regards,
Andrey

entry.title: Re: How to define Plant as Distribution center in S/4HANA
entry.content: Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible that a certificate is not generated in LMS for course completion?
entry.content: Hello Sebastian,

entry.title: Re: Is it possible that a certificate is not generated in LMS for course completion?

entry.title: Re: generate xml from cobol copybook
entry.content: need output xml format like below i manually converted first row of input file in xml

entry.title: Re: generate xml from cobol copybook
entry.content: <root><row><CISYSVENDOR>02305</CISYSVENDOR><CISYSPROMO>040624</CISYSPROMO><CISYSPAYTYPE>C</CISYSPAYTYPE><CISYSFILLER> </CISYSFILLER><CIRECTYPE>0</CIRECTYPE><CICLAIMTYPE>B</CICLAIMTYPE><CIVENDOR>02305</CIVENDOR><CIRELEASEFLAG>Y</CIRELEASEFLAG><CIHEADERVNDRNAME>PROCTER & GAMBLE/CLAIROL</CIHEADERVNDRNAME><CIHEADERFILLER></CIHEADERFILLER></row></root>

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Analysis Tool
entry.content:
Hi @JefB ,

As things stand today: What we understand by internal processing is the time elapsed between the login request and the first request to process the widgets.

This time interval includes:

  • Login (communication with the identity provider)
  • Fetching the Story definition (privilege check, data transfer, etc.)
  • Processing of the Story definition and creation of the story container

If there is a strong increase for this time, the following things should be checked:

  • Content Lib Request in the Dev Tools of the browser
  • What is the size of the payload? Did it increase?
  • Can you rule out that something has been changed in the story?
    • Check the Activity Log
  • Is there a problem with the IdP?

If you don't get any further, please open an Incident that we can look at the problem.

Note: We are going to break down these timings which are currently clustered in “Internal Processing” and provide guidance to next steps midterm.

entry.title: Parallel workflow approval in SAP Success Factors
entry.content:
We have a leave request workflow in Success factors once it is processed by HR, then flow should go to three departments in parallel

1. Ticketing department, 2.Visa Department, 3.Payroll Department , all three can process their respective area at the same time, and they are not dependent On each other. They can process the request independently.

So can we send workflow request to three departments in parallel?

entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content:
Hello @vhsbc92,

According to your scenario, I think Destination Timeout to be defined in SAP Mobile Services > {your_application_id} > Mobile Connectivity

Timeout (ms)(Optional) The number of milliseconds before the connection times out. If set to 0, a system-wide default value of 60 seconds is used.

~ Sincerely Arun

entry.title: Re: Integration of CIM with S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content: Hello Team,

entry.title: Re: latest people profile
entry.content:
Hi,

Please let me know which are the new features as to why you wouldn’t turn on the new Profile. What is missing for you to be able to use it?

Please subscribe to this blog to stay informed about planned rollout for the new Profile including deprecation strategy: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/new-people-profile-experience-first-half-2024-and-second-half-2024/ba-p/13648757

Thanks a lot, Diana
